# Brainvare — AI-First Creative Studio

> Brainvare is an AI-first creative studio based in Kochi, Kerala, India. We integrate data, design, and technology to scale brands through strategic consulting, AI implementation, web/app development, and performance marketing.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.brainvare.com/): Main landing page with services overview, client showreel, portfolio highlights, testimonials, and contact form
- [Services](https://www.brainvare.com/services): Full service catalog — strategic consulting (AI readiness, digital transformation), AI implementation (LLM integration, RAG systems, intelligent agents), web & app development (Next.js, React Native, WebGL), performance marketing (SEO, AEO, programmatic ads, CRO)
- [Work](https://www.brainvare.com/work): Portfolio of selected projects — web development, brand identity, app design, AI solutions
- [About](https://www.brainvare.com/about): Company story, mission, and leadership team — founded by Arun AG (Founder) and Anila G Nair (Co-Founder)
- [Blog](https://www.brainvare.com/blog): 20+ in-depth articles on AI marketing tools, SEO strategies, content automation, AEO, and digital marketing strategy
- [Careers](https://www.brainvare.com/careers): Open positions with online application form

## Key Services

- AI Readiness Assessment & Digital Transformation Strategy
- Custom LLM Integration & RAG Systems
- Intelligent Agents & Automated Workflows
- Next.js / React Web Applications
- React Native Mobile Apps & WebGL Experiences
- SEO & AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
- Programmatic Ad Buying & Conversion Rate Optimization
- Brand Identity & Design Systems
- Video Production & Content Creation

## Featured Articles

- [AI Tools Transforming Digital Marketing 2026](https://www.brainvare.com/blog/ai-tools-transforming-digital-marketing-2026): Comprehensive guide to 50+ AI tools for content, SEO, social, email, analytics, and advertising
- [AI Answer Engine Optimization AEO Guide](https://www.brainvare.com/blog/ai-answer-engine-optimization-aeo-guide): How to optimize for AI search engines like Perplexity, ChatGPT, and Google AI Overviews
- [AI SEO Tools to Rank Higher on Google](https://www.brainvare.com/blog/ai-seo-tools-rank-higher-google): AI-powered SEO tools and strategies for 2026
- [AI Marketing Strategy Framework 2026](https://www.brainvare.com/blog/ai-marketing-strategy-framework-2026): Complete framework for building an AI-first marketing strategy
- [Future of AI Marketing Predictions 2027](https://www.brainvare.com/blog/future-of-ai-marketing-predictions-2027): Forward-looking analysis of AI's impact on marketing
- [AI Content Creation Tools Complete Guide](https://www.brainvare.com/blog/ai-content-creation-tools-complete-guide): Best AI tools for content creation in 2026
- [AI Social Media Marketing Tools](https://www.brainvare.com/blog/ai-social-media-marketing-tools): AI-powered social media management and automation
- [AI Email Marketing Automation Tools](https://www.brainvare.com/blog/ai-email-marketing-automation-tools): AI tools for email marketing automation and personalization
- [AI Local Business Marketing Kerala](https://www.brainvare.com/blog/ai-local-business-marketing-kerala): AI marketing strategies for local businesses in Kerala
